entry.title: currency issue
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

am going to activate of material ledger , but status says ML currency type but not FI Currency type how to solve it although am using S4HANA. 

can anyone please provide any solution ?

entry.title: Setting Status of Networks BAPI_BUS2002_SET_STATUS
entry.content:
Hi. I am currently setting status of Networks using BAPI_BUS2002_SET_STATUS via ProcessRunner. However, I am encountering error: E:CNIF_STATUS-005: Error in processing. Function was not executed.

I am using these BAPIs: 
BAPI_PS_INITIALIZATION
BAPI_BUS2002_SET_STATUS
BAPI_PS_PRECOMMIT
BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting - New Balance Validation Process
entry.content:
Introduction

In this blog, we will discuss about the new Balance Validation process that is delivered with S/4HANA CE2502. The following Fiori apps are part of this release:

  • Run Balance Validation and View Results
  • Manage Balance Validation Rules and Rule Groups
  • Assign Rule Group for Balance Validation

In the new Balance Validation process, you can also create a new task by using the app "Define Balance Validation Task" under Manage Your Solution (F1241) > Configure Your Solution > Application Area: Finance Sub Application Area: Corporate Close > Data Processing.

Additionally, you can import or export the rule group assignments using the following Fiori app:

  • Import/Export Validation Settings

Transition Process

The toggle 'FINCS_BV_ADAPTATION' should be switched-on to view the above apps and also to activate this new Balance Validation process. Please use the app Manage Your Solution (F1241) > Configure Your Solution > Application Area: Finance Sub Application Area: Corporate Close > Data Processing to switch on the toggle. Please follow the below note for the migration process:

  • 3553668 - Group Reporting: Migration of new Balance Validation Process

The steps of the migration is explained with screenshots in the attached file of the above note.  

Is it possible to create a new Task?

Yes. You can refer to the below video that explains the creation of Balance Validation task.

As you can notice, apart from Cons. Unit and Cons. Group categories you can define a new task based on accounting. Here are the  details about Standard tasks that are delivered through content:

  • S0080 - Balance Validation in Accounting
  • S1080 - Balance Validation at Consolidation Unit Level (Reported Data)
  • S1180 - Balance Validation at Consolidation Unit Level (Standardized Data)
  • S2980 - Balance Validation at Consolidation Group Level (Consolidated Data)

How to create a Rule Group?

The rules can be defined using the app "Define Validation Rules" and those rules can be added in the Rule Group as shown below.

You can Navigate to "Define Validation Rules" from this app as shown in the below screenshot.

 

Rule Group Assignment

It is mandatory to assign the Tasks to the Rule Group. The existing Validation Methods are migrated to the rule group as explained in the SNOTE "3553668 - Group Reporting: Migration of new Balance Validation Process". You can refer to the below video that explains the Task assignment to Rule Group:

What are the steps to attach the Task to Monitor(s)?

The tasks that are created using the "Define Balance Validation Task" app can be attached to the Monitor as shown below.

It is also possible to execute the Tasks  in the app "Run Balance Validation and View Results" as shown in the below screenshot.

How is the new Solution better than the old one?

The new Balance Validation process has the following benefits:

  • You can define a new task by choosing one of the Task Categories and run the rule definitions either in Group Reporting or in Accounting as a data source.
  • The performance is optimized and the memory consumption has relatively improved
  • It is now possible to define a maximum of 6 Group By fields
  • All Balance Validation tasks can be executed in one app: Run Balance Validation and View Results. 

Concluding with Additional Links

Please feel free to share your thoughts by commenting on this blog. Also, we can use this blog as a communication tool for any clarification that you require on this topic. You can also follow my profile for more content on analytical application and Balance Validation for group reporting. I would recommend posting your questions by specifying the tag: “SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting”

Define Balance Validation Tasks | SAP Help Portal

Balance Validation Tasks and Task Categories | SAP Help Portal

Working with Balance Validation Rules and Rule Groups | SAP Help Portal

Manage Balance Validation Rules and Rule Groups | SAP Help Portal

Assign Rule Groups for Balance Validation | SAP Help Portal

Run Balance Validation and View Results | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Suppress Custom uibb in sap mdg Customer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created the custom uibb in sap mdg for customer few months before and now we want to remove the block from the UI.

We have removed the block from the UI via configuration.

Doubt is, Is there an option to suppress the block completely so that when we create the Change request we observed that all the methods like get definition/flush/get_data/process event been called.

We want to suppress so that all these method of standard code will not run as it will be better in terms of performance. Thanks.

Kindly suggest me the same so that i dont want the custom entity to be called when the CR is created. 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Request for Lease Management Solution in standard SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

Please provide a solution for lease management in SAP B1. Below are the details:

We have multiple locations, all of which are on rent. We require a lease management system in SAP B1 to efficiently manage our rental agreements.

Kindly guide us on how to implement lease management in SAP B1.

Looking forward to your response.

entry.title: Performance testing
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

One of the project team is conducting performance testing on the Prod environment and when they simulated a large number of users say 100 + at the same time, they have come across the error - "Unable to connect to OIDC provider". Also, when we checked on accounts.login event, we could see "Api rate limit exceeded" error.

They did in stages and 100 users were ramped up in 5 minutes form, so at least 10+ users per seconds as an approximation on requests hit

Can you help me with the resolution for this please. 

 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Performance testing
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The rate limit system is set to support a low volume of traffic from a high number of users/devices (IP-s) and not a high volume of traffic from a low number of users/devices (IP-s).

To avoid hitting rate limit please make sure that only a small amount of accounts.login call made from the same IP address, e.g. couple of hundred calls/hour/IP, to avoid triggering rate limit.

Best Regards,

SAP Solution Support

entry.title: Re: SAP BW/4HANA: The Grey Panther of Data Warehousing

entry.title: Budget Error BP 603 during the WBS to WBS stock transfer
entry.content:

Error Code BP-603

Sufficient budget is available in both WBS , checked in SLR_558 report, in same year. Please help

entry.title: Re: Possible to change the item category when copying the...
entry.content:
I could like to confirm you that its the standard behavior that when line item is copied for framework PO to create new line, the item category and account assignment category will be copied and can't be edited. Its the standard design.

I have double checked in our internal system as well and confirming you here.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Business Rule to send a specific Checklist to an emai...
entry.content:
Hi Brice,
We do have a few Business Rule Actions that might be helpful for your scenario.  They are:

  • Build Checklist Report
  • Build Report
  • Send Email with Attachment

You can find more details regarding these actions here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_admin/actions.html?locale=en-US

If you need more information or have additional questions, please let me know.  Kind Regards, Wendy

entry.title: Re: Removing leading zeroes using XPATH in Content Modifier
entry.content:
Hi @ZTK196 ,

Too long to convert to number 😞

Then, try with a pattern for string: replace(//number, '^0+', '')

Regards,

Roberto

Regards,

Vijai Muniraj

entry.title: Re: Monitoring for SAP B1 HANA
entry.content: as HANA for SAPB1 is running on SLES you can monitor resource usage on OS level.

entry.title: Business processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Central Business Configuration learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will enable you to configure business processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with SAP Central Business Configuration.

Learning objectives

  • Set up the implementation projects for the development system tenants
  • Define the scope and country/region localizations
  • Select the primary finance settings and build the organizational structure
  • Define and transport product-specific configuration values
  • Create users and grant access to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Development System tenants
  • Create users and grant access to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Test and Production Systems

Prerequisites

  • Basic knowledge of SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Central Business Configuration   

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Eclipse(HANA Development): Error when searching for a...

Is there any way to to make the same item as non inventory item?

entry.title: How to Monitor the Impact of Assigning a Consignment Business Partner to a Warehouse in SAP Business
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I've configured a warehouse in SAP Business One and assigned a Business Partner (BP) as the Consignment Business Partner. I'm seeking guidance on how to observe and analyze the effects of this assignment within my documents and reports. Specifically:

  • Which documents or transactions reflect the association between the warehouse and the consignment BP?
  • Are there particular reports that highlight inventory levels, movements, or financial impacts related to consignment stock?
  • How can I ensure that the consignment stock is accurately tracked and reported in the system?
  • Does selecting a Consignment Business Partner for a warehouse automatically populate any fields in related transactions or documents?

Any insights or recommendations on effectively monitoring and managing consignment stock with this setup would be greatly appreciated.

and is the business partner field related to consignment business partner? if yes how does it work ?

Thank you!

entry.title: Datasphere Replication Flow logs
entry.content:
I want to be able to check on the status of my replication flows by checking the log/database tables so I can monitor and check on replication flow execution status programatically.  When I look at the Data Integration Monitor within Datasphere, I can see the Run log details and the Object log details displayed.

The Run log details can be found in the monitoring tables ("TASK_LOGS_V_EXT" and "TASK_LOG_MESSAGES_V_EXT") but I cannot find the Object log details.  See attached file for the Object log details that I am looking for

Does anyone know if these are available?

regs

entry.title: Re: Large Backup Catalog Size and Process to Maintain it
entry.content:
Hello Sheo,

We generated the command based on 36 days retention policy and it ran successfully. However, we the oldest backup showing is now 253 days which was earlier 1000 days. I suspect that the command only covered full backups and not differential backups. Hence last 36 weeks full backups are available in backup catalog.

Our backup policy is weekly full back followed by daily differential backups.

Is there any update we can use in the command.

Thanks

Deepak Sharma

entry.title: Re: Why "Just Ask" feature not available for Neo tenant?
entry.content:
Hi Vijai,
That is correct SAP Analytics Cloud just ask NLQ feature is not available on Neo tenants nor on Alibaba Cloud tenants.
SAP Analytics Cloud investment and new features are focussed on Google Cloud,  Microsoft Azure and Amazon AWS infrastructures. 
There is no plan to release just ask feature on SAP Analytics Cloud tenants running on Neo
Thanks,
François

entry.title: Re: SAP Extended Warehouse Management for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition: functional comparison
entry.content: Can I use SAP EWM for S/4HANA on premise in combination with S/4HANA Cloud, private cloud edition and what are the Framework conditions?

entry.title: Re: How To Read Data From TCP/IP Socket and Port Using AB...
entry.content:
To my knowledge, the ABAP programming language does not provide the tools for writing a TCP/IP client. (There is the ABAP Push Channel framework, but this provides only TCP/IP server functionality. However, you need client functionality here.)

The best way I can see, is to use a middleware that communicates with the ABAP side via RFC protocol, and with the program on the remote host via TCP/IP protocol. For example, you could use SAP Business Connector, which provides all the RFC connectivity out of the box, and allows custom Java or C/C++ code to be plugged in, and you could then write the communication code with the remote host using standard java.net.Socket.

You should also check: often third-party products don't require you to write low-level networking code yourself, but provide some kind of "client library", that does it for you. If this is the case here as well, e.g. a client library is available for Java or for C/C++, then you could install that library on the Business Connector and use it easily.

Steps to do would be:

  1. Download and install SAP BC. (Takes 5min. No extra license fee is required, if you have a standard SAP license, but a one-time registration is needed to get to the download page.)
  2. On ABAP side, create a destination of type "T" in SM59.
  3. On SAP BC side, configure logon data for the SAP system and a matching "Listener" to the above SM59-destination. (Configuration)
  4. On SAP BC side, write a few Java or C/C++ Services that do the communication with 192.168.0.1:1702.
    (E.g. one each for connection open, read data, write data, connection close. Or if the communication is a simple "one-step request", you could put the entire code into one single Service, which returns the final output, and then call this from ABAP.)
  5. On ABAP side, create empty function modules with input/output, who match the above "Services".
  6. On SAP BC side, create Inbound Maps, where you bind the function modules to the Services. (Configuration)
  7. In your ABAP code, call the function modules on the destination pointing to the SAP BC. Voilà.

Here some documentation: Documentation
You will need the SAPAdaperGuide for the necessary configuration steps, and the DeveloperGuide for how to write Java or C/C++ Services.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere News in December
entry.content:
Hello,

Folders are supported now. But how do I get the information on folders with the API? Which objects are in which folders? What is their hierarchical structure? And how can I create folders with the API? 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d0ecd6f297ac40249072a44df0549c1a/6f5c65f209004751aa48f9682ee2ec45.html

entry.title: Re: how to create two outbound cremas idoc if same vendor is extended to two company codes
entry.content:
I have added the ALE tag. It's most probably a question for the ALE experts.

If ALE doesn't provide such a feature, a workaround would be to send the IDoc to a middleware tool (e.g. SAP BC), and here set it up so that it sends the IDoc to two receivers.

(However, that opens up a whole can of worms... What to do in cases, where the IDoc is sent to the first receiver successfully, but the second receiver fails due to a network error...? If you reply "OK" to the SAP system, the second receiver will never receive the IDoc, and if you reply with "Rolled Back", then the SAP system will repeat the IDoc, and the first receiver may receive it twice... You will probably have to setup "store & forward" and separate status keeping for both receivers on the middleware.)

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge - SAP Community Escape House - UI5

entry.title: Does SAP provide a solution to improve employee onboarding, retention, and development?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering SAP Solutions for Talent Management learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey is designed to help you discover the SAP Talent Management solution area. You will equip yourself with the skills to articulate the value of SAP Talent Management. 

Learning Objectives
Upon completing this learning journey, you will be able to leverage the potential of the SAP Talent Management solution, build a comprehensive vision for its implementation, and extend its value across various applications. 

Prerequisites

  • Discovering the SAP SuccessFactors HCM Portfolio

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Polish Localization

entry.title: Re: Polish Localization

entry.title: Force Confirmation
entry.content:
Why Force Confirmed Sales Orders are not included in Confirmation Update Runs ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Force Confirmation
entry.content:
Hi All,

  • The Confirmation Update Runs subview allows you to manage mass data runs for availability checks and updating of sales orders, service orders, and stock transfer orders. It verifies the confirmed dates and quantities for sales orders items to ensure they are still valid or need to be updated.
  • However when manually Force Confirmation is done it states that it is important and no further check is required to update as it has already reached for execution for next step as it is confirmed already.
  • You can reset a forced confirmation by canceling the confirmation or by checking the availability for the customer demand again. Note that forced confirmations are not included in confirmation update runs.
  • Refer help center document :Availability Checks | SAP Help Portal 

Best Regards,
Kopal Upadhyay
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Consuming SAP Build API's made easy with SAP Cloud SDK in your CAP application

Vijai Muniraj

entry.title: Re: Bin to Bin Stock Transfer
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

In addition, after the release of 2408, there is an option that the system sets the goods movement bin for automatically generated packaging items at the time of generation. In the app, you can specify the packaging item type and the warehouse for the goods movement bin.

When you post goods issue for a packaging item, the system posts it from this warehouse bin.

For further information, please check:

Determine Goods Movement Bin - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/87f9b54f9c4f4e75aff0061860a6589a/d7da780ba74d4e3284c70164530cc4a2.html?locale=en-US

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part II: Provisioning to BTP and S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @gabi_maier_ethz ,

I can think of ways already today to create groups and assign users in SAP CIS Identity Directory from Entra, for example by calling the Identity Directory SCIM API from an Azure Logic App that hooks into the lifecycle events of the access packages. However, this requires custom coding and means code ownership/maintenance.

As mentioned on the DSAG session from January 16th, please stay tuned for enhanced capabilities in the SAP Cloud Identity Services SCIM connector in Entra.

Best regards

Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ 2.0 Document generation - dynamic template se...
entry.content:
Hello Kai,

thanks for your response. 

The current output format is PDF. That should be the way to go because they do not want to allow the sales person to edit the whole document e.g. price sections and upload it again. There should only be small sections in the document with sometimes automatically selected text templates based on different attributes from the variants configuration or on the other hand could be selected via drop-down menu, which should be editable by the sales person.

In addition I am in a conversation with SAP to find the best solution for this requirement. 

Best regards, 

Tobias

entry.title: Re: database connection to Microsoft Dynamics 365
entry.content:
Hello, found some useful info, hope it will help.

To connect SAP Crystal Reports with data from Dynamics 365 Business Central, you can use a JDBC driver. This driver helps you pull live data into Crystal Reports. 

First, install the JDBC driver. You’ll also need to set up Crystal Reports to use it. To do this, add the driver’s JAR file to Crystal Reports' classpath. You can find the CRConfig.xml file in the SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise folder. Once you have done that, open the Report Wizard in Crystal Reports to start making your report.

While setting up the connection, you will need a JDBC URL that connects to your Business Central instance. This URL includes details like your OrganizationUrl, User, and AccessKey. You can find these in the settings of Dynamics 365 Business Central. This setup keeps your reports linked to the latest data.

After your connection is working, you can choose tables and fields for your report. You can also link different tables, set filters, and add visuals like charts. A big plus is that you can sort and summarize data on the server. Plus, you can drill down into the data whenever needed. This helps you get just the information you want.

Might also recommend a cool Dynamics integration specialist https://www.hiredynamicsdevelopers.com/dynamics-365-integration-services/.

entry.title: Re: Realignment function
entry.content:
As long as you execute realignment job in periodic mode, you should be able to track the original posting as the document number should be the same, though the document type is different for the new posting.
If you map HSL( local currency ) to Group Currency in GRPL in version definition, check the reversal against original posting first.

entry.title: Fiori App F1250 - Dump => HTTP 500 Error
entry.content:
Hello,

we are using the fiori launchpad on an S/4 Hana 2020, SP2 system and build a dashboard for analytical SD apps. It works fine and the figures look alright. So far so good.

However when the user is working with the 'Flexible Sales Volume Analysis' (F1250) and he is changing for example the order of the columns he get's an http 500 error. The dump is triggered in method: PREPROCESS_REQUEST(CL_WDR_CLIENT_ABSTRACT_HTTP). In ST22 there is the runtime 'OBJECTS_OBJREF_NOT_ASSIGNED_NO'. The program is 'CL_BICS_QV_AXIS'

How can this problem be solved and avoided? Is there a note available?

Any help or hint would be appritiated,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Why "Just Ask" feature not available for Neo tenant?
entry.content:
Hi,


Yes. each SAP Analytics Cloud feature documentation include their potential restrictions, in the case of just ask it is mentioned on this first page:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/95dbe296761940c2bf4e18d54a20f3df.html

To migrate from Neo to Cloud Found (Hyperscalers) check SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3119338/EThanks,
François

entry.title: Re: Changing the item type from inventory item to non inv...
entry.content:
Hi Underdog,

The following is mentioned in SAP Business One Help:

You can change an inventory item to non-inventory, or the opposite, provided that:

  • No transactions have been posted for the item

  • There are no documents for the item, that is, sales quotation, sales order, purchase order, A/R or A/P down payment request, or draft

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: sap build code authorization error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '$count')
entry.content:
I am working on a CAP (Cloud Application Programming) model where I have an entity called booksService.books, and I am applying role-based access control to filter certain fields based on user roles.

entity books {
key ID : UUID;
title : String;
author : String;
Sales : Integer;
Price : Integer;
} 

User Roles and Their Permissions:

  • AdminAll → Can see all data
  • viewExSales → Can see all fields except sales 

I initially wrote this event handler to modify the query when a user has the "viewExSales" role, so they cannot see the Sales column:

 

/**
 * 
 * @On(event = { "READ" }, entity = "booksService.books")
 * @Param {Object} request - User information, tenant-specific CDS model, headers, and query parameters
 */
module.exports = async function (request) {
    if (request.user.is('viewExSales')) {
        // Remove the 'Sales' column from the query
        request.query.columns = request.query.columns.filter(column => column !== 'Sales');
    }
};

 

 i get error

 

[cds] - ❗️Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '$count')
    at all (/home/user/projects/books/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/fiori/lean-draft.js:982:80)
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
    at async cds.ApplicationService.handle (/home/user/projects/books/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/fiori/lean-draft.js:447:20)

 

So, I also tried implementing manual query filtering based on roles like this

 

module.exports = async function(request) {
    const { books } = cds.entities;
    const user = request.user;
    
    let columns = ['ID', 'title', 'author', 'Sales', 'Price'];

    if (user) {
        const userRoles = Array.isArray(user.roles) ? user.roles : Object.keys(user.roles);

        if (userRoles.includes('AdminAll')) {
            return await SELECT.from(books).columns(...columns);
        } 
        
        if (userRoles.includes('viewExSales')) {
            columns = columns.filter(col => col !== 'Sales');
        }

        return await SELECT.from(books).columns(...columns);
    } 

    return await SELECT.from(books).columns(...columns);
};

 

it works and returned the data correctly but there were issues in it

Issue:

  1. Filters and searches applied via the generated Fiori UI are ignored.
  • If I filter by title or author, the backend still returns the full dataset instead of the filtered results.
  • It seems like my custom query is overriding the default behavior of CAP filtering.

entry.title: MB1B vs. BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE
entry.content:
Hello, 

When using MB1B with a movement 413E (sales order to sales order), the WBS field (MSEG-PS_PSP_PNR) in the material document is NOT populated. When using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE, that same field is populated. Other than that, everything is works fine. Can anyone tell me if there is a way to tell the BAPI to not populate the WBS?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Creating a SuccessFactors Learning Story Report: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content: All the standard Learning Administration reports can be setup on a recurring basis (daily, weekly, or monthly) that can be emailed to anyone or accessed by the admin that created the report via their Report Jobs.  For admins with greater system access, report files can be exported, which can include sending them to an SFTP server.

entry.title: SAP LeanIX Dashboards E-Learning is now available.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Signavio Community, 

SAP Business Process Transformation Value Map, along with the SAP LeanIX Academy team, is excited to announce we have released our next E-Learning session.  This E-Learning is hosted on the SAP Enterprise Support Academy.

What is the session about?

Discover how to effectively manage and navigate SAP LeanIX Dashboards to create meaningful and actionable overviews. 

What are the session goals?

Course:  SAP LeanIX Dashboards.

  • Learn how to create, manage, and navigate dashboards
  • Explore practical examples of how dashboards can be used to leverage their potential for maximum value
  • Understand dashboard permissions 

How to access?

NOTE:  You MUST be registered with the SAP Enterprise Support Academy in order to access the “direct links” to these courses below (and can do so right here if not currently registered).

Get started with SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps here. (Check out our step-by-step instructional video  on how to join SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value maps.)

Direct link to the new E-Learning courses (once registered as stated above).

  • Course: SAP LeanIX Dashboards

Do you need additional help?

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "Business Transformation Management" topic).

Regards, 

Leean De Loria

entry.title: Re: Can change documents be written when using the ADDR_C...
entry.content:
Thanks, Raymond, for your recommendation.

Now my next step was to write a COMMIT WORK after the ADDR_MEMORY_SAVE function call and then it already worked with change documents. 🙂

Anyway, thanks for the idea with ADRESSE_WRITE_DOCUMENT. I wasn't aware about it and will keep it in mind for other situations.

We have not yet managed to Crack that any help would be appreciated.

KR

Sunam

entry.title: Re: Streamlining Sustainability Reporting: Integrating SAP Green Ledger with SAP Group Reporting
entry.content: Great post with nice 'end-to-end' story regarding GHG/ESG data and reporting.

entry.title: Unable to preview the Fiori application in sap bas throwing Self signed certificate error.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create a application using smart filterbar and smart table where i am trying to map the odataservice.

When i try to preview / check locally from the BAS the metadata is not getting loaded and throwing 500 Internal server error. When i checked the logs its throwing the below error.

Please help me on this...

entry.title: Something wrong on RDR10 LineNum?
entry.content:
Hello guys,
here again for your support, please.

I can't understand why in the draft A/R Invoice posted in the image below, I can see a correct sequence of the Test Lines, but in the table RDR10 it seems wrong, also if I try to print the draft CR layout. 

As you can see, in the table RDR1 I've 9 records (VisOrder from 0 to 😎 and LineNum between 1 and 11 (Line 0, 2 and 7 have been deleted), but in the RDR10 LineSeq and AftLineNum are between 0 and 8, including 2 and 7...

The result is that if I'll print the CR layout, the last text line is printed under the 8 LineNum which is wrong.

May be a bug?
It's the first case occurred and probably it depends by having modified the draft Invoice deleting LineNum 0, 2 and 7 and contextually inserting the new lines  9, 10 and 11 before saving (this did not update the RDR10) but I can't understand why in the GUI the sequence of the text lines is correct if in the table not.

SBO FP 2402 (10.00.240) MSSQL
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to Create Custom SAP Fiori Report Tile
entry.content:
Fiori Reports are designed in a manner which not only help business users to query and build their reports but also allow the end users to create or post data directly into the system, eliminating the need to switch back to the GUI windows and enter the T-Code for running the transactions.

Opening SAP GUI and memorizing T-Codes would have been a tricky job for many end users when it comes to customers introduced to SAP systems.  Users can now search their favorite report names directly in the SAP Fiori Launchpad provided they have been enabled with the required authorizations and mapped to the respective catalogs. 

With the ABAP CDS developers, they can consume their custom created CDS models into the a Fiori Report and view it under Fiori Launchpad for advanced reporting. 

Lets say you've a custom CDS and you wish to create a Custom Fiori Tile. Below listed is a way on how to create a custom Fiori Tile within few minutes and deliver to your business users for their reporting needs.

  • Creating Custom Catalog

 

  • Look for the app technical catalog id and copy the same.
  • Open Fiori Designer (/UI2/FLPD_CONF) for cross client or (/UI2/FLPD_CUST) for client specific or can access from the Fiori Launchpad.
  • Once Fiori Designer is accessed, click on the ‘+’ button at the bottom left to create a custom catalog.

 

  • Enter appropriate name and id in the dialog box and select Standard/Remote as per requirement. This title will be used to find the catalog in further use and the combination of title an id will help security to map this with your account.

 

  • Once the catalog is created, paste the copied technical catalog id in the ‘search for catalog’ window and navigate to the required app.
  • For illustration, I’ve searched for SAP_TC_PS_COMMON catalog and used WBS Element Overview to create reference.
  • Click and hold the app, Create reference will get visible then, now drag the app and drop at the create reference box.  Repeat the same step for the Target Mapping to create reference else app won’t work.
  •  
    Once dropped it will pop up a dialog box to choose the destination catalog. Enter the title/name of the catalog you created and select it to have the app moved to the respective catalog.

 

 

  • This will conclude your custom catalog creation and collecting apps in the same.

 

  • Creating Custom Group
  • Once the catalog creation and app collection is done, switch the pane to group and click on the ‘+’ button at the bottom left to create custom group.

 

Steps are same as creating custom catalog, enter the title and id for the group to create your custom group. And you can select or deselect the option where users get access to personalize the group.

  • Enabling users to personalize their group is an optional step, if you wish not to enable then you can uncheck the box and save the group.
  • Once created, search your created group id in the search box and in the right pane click to find the ‘+’ button in show as tiles to add your app tile.

 

  • Click on the add tile button (+) and a new window will open, search for your catalog to add tile of the app.

  • Now once you’ve accessed your catalog, you will see that your referenced app is visible there but greyed out. Click on the ‘+’ button to add the tile in and this will make visible your app in the front end.

Ensure that the created Group is mapped to your user id by your SAP Security Team to view and access the report created.

Happy Learning! 🙂

entry.title: Re: SRDEBUG IN S/4 HANA 1909
entry.content: Tcode RSBREAKPOINTS can be used to display and delete breakpoints in S/4 HANA on premise version.

entry.title: Re: OData Exploration with EPM Tutorial - ES5
entry.content:
Hello MH_K,

your screenshot shows the Fiori Launchpad (URL /sap/bc/ui2/flp) and not the WEBGUI (URL /sap/bc/gui/sap/its/webgui). The login mask for the system of the tutorial (https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/sap/bc/gui/sap/its/webgui) for me looks like this:

 

After logging in to the WEBGUI interface it should look something like this showing you the SAP Easy Access Menu screen:

 

From there the tutorials on how to show the OK code field from the other answers should take you to your goal.

Best regards

Simon

 

PS: This is a repost of my previous comment as an answer (thanks @Sandra_Rossi)

entry.title: Re: Missing Archive Export DVD for Product S4HANA_OP_2023...
entry.content:
Hi you can find the solution in follw sapnote

2792660 - DVD kit S4HANA_OP_<release level> is requested by SUM in the upgrade phase READDATA_EXP while upgrading to S/4HANA <release level>. | SAP Knowledge Base Article

 

Goodluck!!

entry.title: how to concatenate material description values ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am creating a material, selecting a characteristic value and populating it as material description value(using read_entity_data_all in GET_DATA of feeder class) of Descriptions block.

If there are multiple characteristic values, I would like to know how can i concatenate the material description values.

ex : A , B , C etc. under Material description

 

regards

Chandra Kishore.

entry.title: Re: RAP - implement a validation on delete action
entry.content:
Hi Mourad,

I think in this case it is easier to use instance feature control, e.g.:

 delete (features: instance);

This way you can enable/disable the delete option under certain conditions.

If this is not suiting your requirements, an alternative would be to do a select on your entity within the validation handler method to obtain the entity data.

I hope one of these options will help you.

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS View - Length of CAST rounded in 7.40 SP8
entry.content:
Hey Sandra,

It seems very strange, but does work for me. Although i'm at a much higher version of ABAP. Although, it does give a warning that casting from 50 to 24 could cause a data loss.

    

Thanks,
Srinivasa

entry.title: SAP LeanIX Automations E-Learning is now available.

Hello SAP Signavio Community, 

SAP Business Process Transformation Value Map, along with the SAP LeanIX Academy team, is excited to announce we have released our next E-Learning session, SAP LeanIX Automations.  This E-Learning is hosted on the SAP Enterprise Support Academy.

What is the session about?

Understand the benefits of using SAP LeanIX Automations to eliminate manual tasks, enrich user engagement, facilitate collaboration, and ensure data quality.

What are the session goals?

Course:  SAP LeanIX Automations

  • Learn how to eliminate manual tasks and processing using event-based triggers that initiate automated actions
  • Understand how automations ensure consistent and efficient workflows 

How to access?

Get started with SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps here. (Check out our step-by-step instructional video  on how to join SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value maps.)

entry.title: Re: Hi SAP Support How to Get File PDF Layout invoice By...
entry.content:
Hi nitmanet168,

Refer to SAP Note 2966187 for the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Something wrong on RDR10 LineNum?
entry.content:
Hi dausto ,

Select nextNumber = VisOrder, OrderNum = 0, lineType = 'R', ItemCode from inv1 whereDocEntry = XXXX
union all
select nextNumber = AftLineNum, OrderNum, lineType, lineText from inv10 where DocEntry = XXXX
order by nextNumber, OrderNum

Please use the above logic when you are creating custom crystal layouts and share the results.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Unlocking Efficiency: The Power of PLM System Integration (PLMSI) by SAP
entry.content: Thanks for the comment, Staebler. I am glad it was helpful.

entry.title: Re: How To Read Data From TCP/IP Socket and Port Using AB...
entry.content:
Update: in newer Releases, the ABAP Push Channel also supports TCP/IP client functionality, however only with a few limitations: the received data packets need to have

  • either a fixed length
  • or a uniform end-indicator (like CRLF or similar)
  • or a header field indicating the current packet-length

So if the external program sends frames/packets of that kind, you may be able to use APC.
Documentation: ABAP Push Channels | SAP Help Portal --> APC Development --> "APC Client Development" as well as  "TCP Socket Framing Specification"

entry.title: Request for Adjustment of Movement Type for Goods Receipt
entry.content: I want to use transaction VL31N to record a stock entry using movement type 501 instead of the standard 101, without going through MIGO or referencing any document.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to use Maintain Standard Text app in P...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please find below 2 references on how you can achieve this requirement. 

  • SAP Note - 3524757 - How to include a Standard Text on a Purchase Order form
  • SAP Blog - S/4HANA Cloud - Managing and Integrating Standard Text in Sales Print documents

It also helps to tackle it from LOB perspective, for example, if you want certain text to be visible on all Sales orders, you could maintain it directly in the document and it will be available for printing on the Form.

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: Re: This new Data Architecture called "Shift Left" is a game changer and the industry is t
entry.content: Insightful! Great Job!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting - New Balance Validation Process
entry.content:
Hello Hari,
Thanks for sharing this new feature. Regarding "run the rule definitions either in Group Reporting or in Accounting as a data source", just would like to know how to specify whether the data source is ACDOCA or ACDOCU?

Best Regards,
Hengye

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello, it is great to meet you in the community. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia.

You have come to a great community where you can share ideas, learn together, and to build your network.

Please meet @Sandra_Solis and @SergioG_TX who are both SAP Champions - SAP Community

Wishing you the best in your SAP journey!

entry.title: Re: RAP - implement a validation on delete action
entry.content:
Hi anoukvandenengel,

Thank you for the reply. I actually implemented the requirement using the precheck syntax :

delete (precheck); 

The logic is then implemented in the method precheck_delete( ) where I have access to the instance to be deleted as at this point the modification didn't reach the transnational buffer. 

Regards,
Mourad

entry.title: How to Consume Sales order A2X RFC BAPI API(SAP_COM_0109) in SAP Public Cloud BADI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to consume Sales order A2X RFC BAPI API(SAP_COM_0109) in ADT to update sales order data for few custom fields created using Business service consumption model in BADI: SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD,

Kindly suggest if this is a plausible approach and please guide on how the service consumption model can be configured and used in SAP Public cloud.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Margit
